  1. com.github.oshi
  2. oshi.ffm

Uses of Package
oshi.ffm

Packages that use oshi.ffm
Package
Description
oshi
[oshi-core API] Provides a cross-platform implementation to retrieve Operating System and Hardware Information, such as OS version, memory, CPU, disk, devices, sensors, etc.
oshi.ffm.mac
Provides FFM access to system libraries for macOS.
oshi.ffm.unix
Provides FFM access to system libraries for Unix-like systems.
oshi.ffm.windows
Provides Windows-specific Foreign Function and Memory (FFM) API implementations.
oshi.ffm.windows.com
Provides FFM-based COM (Component Object Model) infrastructure for Windows WMI queries.

    Class
    Description
    SystemInfo
    System information.

    Description
    ForeignFunctions
    Base class providing utility methods for working with the Java Foreign Function and Memory (FFM) API.

    Base class providing utility methods for working with the Java Foreign Function and Memory (FFM) API.
